calendar_id.description: Single Google Calendar id to list. Omit to use primary unless calendar_ids or include_all_calendars is provided.

calendar_ids.description: Specific Google Calendar ids to list and merge. Use after list_calendars when answering across multiple named calendars.

include_all_calendars.description: When true, discover available calendars and merge matching events across them instead of only using primary.

time_min.description: RFC3339 lower bound for event start time. Omit for upcoming events from the current UTC time.

time_max.description: RFC3339 upper bound for event start time, useful for today, tomorrow, or next-24-hours windows.

page_token.description: Single-calendar Google Calendar nextPageToken. Do not use with calendar_ids or include_all_calendars; use page_tokens for merged requests.

page_tokens.description: Per-calendar nextPageToken map for merged calendar_ids or include_all_calendars pagination. Keys are calendar ids from nextPageTokens; values are that calendar's token.

max_results.description: Maximum events per calendar. Defaults to 25 and Google allows up to 2500.

query.description: Google Calendar text search for meeting titles, attendee names/emails, locations, descriptions, or keywords.
